project_info.name: Saudia Visa Jordan
project_info.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
project_info.description: A highly premium, modern, and comprehensive visa services website for a Saudi visa agency in Jordan. Features include a professions database with printable PDF requirements, fee calculator, modern blog, smooth interactions, and a premium print-ready document template.

primary.name: Soft Navy Blue
primary.usage: Headers, primary buttons, major structural elements, and text accents. Conveys trust and authority.

secondary.name: Muted Gold
secondary.usage: CTAs, hover states, icons, thin borders, and premium highlights. Replaces harsh yellow-gold for a sophisticated luxury feel.

background.name: Alabaster White
background.usage: Main page background to prevent eye strain and feel organic.

surface.name: Pure White
surface.usage: Cards, bento grids, dropdowns, and calculator containers.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1B2A41]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1B2A41]

rules: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings above 32px.
Never use pure black for text; use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny (text-xs), with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) in Muted Gold.

grid_strategy.marketing: Asymmetrical Bento Grids (mix of col-span-1, col-span-2, row-span-2) with gap-6 or gap-8.
grid_strategy.dashboards_tools: Dense, functional grids for the Fee Calculator and Professions Database (gap-4).

borders_and_radius.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements. Avoid pill-shaped buttons unless it's a specific CTA.
borders_and_radius.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for hovering cards. Soft, diffuse, luxurious.

navigation.rules: Sticky top, Z-50. Must include Logo, 5 links, and a primary Gold CTA. Never hide desktop links behind a hamburger menu.

hero_section.rules: Use the generated hero_office image. Max overlay opacity bg-black/30 or gradient-to-r from-[#1B2A41]/90 to-transparent. High contrast text.

cards_bento.style: Flat background (Pure White), 1px subtle border (border-gray-100 or gold_subtle), hover lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow.

forms_inputs.style: Shadcn UI customized. rounded-lg, border-gray-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C9A26A] focus:border-transparent.

news_marquee.rules: Slow, smooth drift. Pale background (bg-gray-50), dark earthy text (text-[#1B2A41]). Font-serif or Alexandria medium. Massive gaps between items (gap-24).

professions_database.layout: Data-heavy but beautiful. Advanced search bar with filters. Table or Grid view for 856+ professions.
professions_database.pdf_export: CRITICAL FEATURE. The 'Print/Download' button must generate a luxurious PDF. The PDF must contain an Official Header (Logo, Office Name, Email, Phone, Amman Address), document title, and the required papers checklist. Use the 'pdf_document_mockup' for aesthetic inspiration.

fee_calculator.layout: Interactive Shadcn-based sliders and selects inside a Neumorphic or sleek bordered card. Real-time total calculation with a Muted Gold highlight.

visa_services.layout: Rich content pages (Work Visa, Visit Visa, Attestations). Use icons (Phosphor or Lucide) in a 3-column feature grid. Include clear timeline steps.

blog_and_cms.layout: Netlify CMS ready. Clean, image-focused bento grid for articles. Reading time tags, author info.

footer.layout: Massive and luxurious (py-24 bg-[#1B2A41] text-white). Include a dynamic Google Maps embed (1st Circle, Amman, Jordan). Include large typography for 'Let's Talk'.

motion_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have hover states (color shift, slight transform, soft shadow).
motion_interactions.scroll: Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (staggered fade-up for lists and cards).
motion_interactions.pdf_generation: Show a luxurious loading spinner (gold tinted) while generating the document.

imagery.rules: No placeholder images. Use provided URLs. High-quality, modern corporate feel.

hero_background.description: Wide-angle minimal architectural interior, bright modern office with subtle luxurious gold and soft navy blue accents.

visa_documents.description: Close up of a premium passport and official travel documents on a clean desk.

premium_abstract.description: Abstract elegant 3D composition with soft navy blue and muted gold geometric shapes.

pdf_mockup.description: Modern premium print document template mockup with luxurious gold header.

amman_office_1.description: A view of Amman city with buildings.

professionals_1.description: Two professionals talking in a meeting room.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text is aligned appropriately (Right-to-Left RTL for Arabic, or handle bi-directional text gracefully).
Build the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
MANDATORY: Implement `data-testid` for all interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) as required by testing rules.

The Professions Database must have a functioning search/filter and a 'Print/Download PDF' button. Use a library like jspdf or html2canvas, or just a custom print stylesheet (@media print) that formats the page with a dedicated office header (Logo, Amman 1st Circle Address, Email, Phone).
Integrate a Google Maps iframe in the footer or contact section pointing to '1st Circle, Amman, Jordan'.
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered bento grid animations.
Implement a News Ticker using react-fast-marquee.
Ensure Netlify CMS integration points (like a /admin folder or static markdown/JSON parsing structure) are set up for the blog and professions.
Do NOT use pure black or generic blue. Strictly adhere to Soft Navy Blue (#1B2A41) and Muted Gold (#C9A26A).
Apply generous spacing (p-8, p-12) to create a luxurious 'breathing room' effect across all sections.
